Safe • Fast • Insured
Neden Bizi Seçmelisiniz?

Baştan sona özenli ve profesyonel nakliyat.

Customers choose Gökhan Nakliyat because the team works quickly, wraps items carefully, handles assembly, and delivers belongings without damage. The service is known for friendly staff, clean work and reliable timing.

  • Careful packing and furniture protection
  • Urban and intercity moving
  • Elevator hoist for high floors
  • Friendly, respectful and experienced team

Process

Kolay Taşınma Süreci

01

İletişim

Call or message us with your location and moving details.

02

Planlama

03

Paketleme ve Taşıma

Your items are packed, loaded and transported safely.

04

Teslimat

We unload, assemble and finish the job with care.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you pack all items?

Yes. Items can be wrapped with protective materials and prepared safely before transport.

Do you provide elevator moving?

Yes. Elevator hoist service is available for high floors and difficult buildings.

Do you work inside Istanbul only?

The company serves Istanbul and can support urban or intercity moves depending on the request.

How can I get a price?

Call or send a WhatsApp message with your location, floor number, house size and moving date.

Taşınmaya Hazır mısınız?
